/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	Status nvarchar(150) NULL,
	Description nvarchar(250) NULL,
	CreateUserId int NULL,
	CreateTime datetime NULL,
	UpdateUserId int NULL,
	UpdateTime datetime NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus_CreateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR CreateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus_UpdateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR UpdateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK___BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelCheckStatus', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 



/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	Status nvarchar(150) NULL,
	Description nvarchar(250) NULL,
	CreateUserId int NULL,
	CreateTime datetime NULL,
	UpdateUserId int NULL,
	UpdateTime datetime NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus_CreateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR CreateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus_UpdateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR UpdateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK___BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelInternalStatus', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 



/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	Status nvarchar(150) NULL,
	Description nvarchar(250) NULL,
	CreateUserId int NULL,
	CreateTime datetime NULL,
	UpdateUserId int NULL,
	UpdateTime datetime NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus_CreateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR CreateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus_UpdateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR UpdateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK___BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelExternalStatus', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 



/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	Tag nvarchar(150) NULL,
	Description nvarchar(250) NULL,
	CreateUserId int NULL,
	CreateTime datetime NULL,
	UpdateUserId int NULL,
	UpdateTime datetime NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF_CheckStatus_CreateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR CreateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF_CheckStatus_UpdateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR UpdateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK___BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelMHD_Tag', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 



/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	ArticleId int NOT NULL,
	PackagingRegulation_Available bit NULL,
    PackagingRegulation_Available_AttachmentId int NULL,
	TSP_Available bit NULL,
    TSP_Available_AttachmentId int NULL,
	QSV bit NULL,
    QSV_AttachmentId int NULL,
	PurchasingArticleInspection__SpecialArticlesCustomerSpecific bit NULL,
    PurchasingArticleInspection__SpecialArticlesCustomerSpecific_AttachmentId int NULL,
	SpecialCustomerReleases__DeviationReleases bit NULL,
    SpecialCustomerReleases__DeviationReleases_AttachmentId int NULL,
	
	UL_zertifiziert_AttachmentId int NULL,
	UL_Etikett_AttachmentId  int NULL,
    LLE_AttachmentId int NULL,
    ESD_AttachmentId int NULL,
    HM_AttachmentId int NULL,
    ROHS_EEE_Confirmity_AttachmentId int NULL,
    MineralsConfirmity_AttachmentId int NULL,
    REACH_SVHC_Confirmity_AttachmentId int NULL,
    Dienstleistung_AttachmentId int NULL,
    MHD_AttachmentId int NULL,
    CoC_Pflichtig_AttachmentId int NULL,
    EMPB_AttachmentId int NULL,
    EMPB_Freigegeben_AttachmentId int NULL,
		
	CreateUserId int NULL,
	CreateTime datetime NULL,
	UpdateUserId int NULL,
	UpdateTime datetime NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension_CreateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR CreateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension_UpdateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR UpdateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK___BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelQualityExtension', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
